meta.title: Samantha — Canonical Design Decisions
meta.description: Complete index of every canonical design decision across the Samantha/Hermes ecosystem. Single source of truth. Every principle, model choice, architectural decision, tool selection, skill classification, and anti-pattern.

philosophy.source: Clark & Chalmers Extended Mind Thesis (1998) — operationalized for AI agents
philosophy.notes: Everything is in skill files, config, or markdown. The SOUL is ~800 chars — an identity, not a procedure.

philosophy.source: Dochkina 2026, Google Scaling Agent Study — validated dynamic delegation
philosophy.notes: CEO delegates to temp workers. max_spawn_depth=3, max_concurrent=3. Sub-agents have no SOUL/personality.

philosophy.source: Simon's v3.1 distillation model + repo Funnel Cognition 4-stage
philosophy.notes: Two complementary models: 4-stage Funnel (Chaotic→Distillation→Categorization→Structured) and 3-phase Distillation Cycle (DÉMÊLER→DISTILLER→DÉCIDER). Both active.

philosophy.source: Anthropic Context Engineering, Stigmem ("Stop Preloading Everything")
philosophy.notes: Skills loaded on demand (2-layer: core always, auto-detect on trigger). Context funnel pipeline. Target: 500K→100K token reduction.

models.rationale: Think-through-agent speed > raw model power. Ratio qualité/prix absurde.
models.evidence: USER.md: 'Flash > Pro for 99%'. Config now reflects this.

models.rationale: Complex reasoning, architectural critiques, edge cases where Flash insufficient
models.notes: Simon explicitly prefers Flash for 99% of cases. Pro only when asked or when Flash fails.

models.rationale: Non-vision primary model needs auxiliary vision
models.notes: Via vision_analyze tool with auxiliary vision model. Only for images.

models.rationale: Avoid Gemini hallucinations in curator. Dedicated fixed config.
models.notes: Forced in config to prevent dry-run mode. Skill: config-verification-patterns.

models.rationale: Maximizes speed. Reasoning model too expensive for daily use.

architecture.details: Core: 14 always-loaded skills in system prompt. Auto-detect: ~76 skills loaded on trigger. priority: core/standard/niche/one-shot classification in YAML frontmatter.
architecture.configured_in: All skills SKILL.md frontmatter priority: field

architecture.details: CEO spawns temp workers on demand. No fixed role hierarchy. max_spawn_depth=3, max_concurrent=3. Validated by Dochkina 2026, Google Scaling Study.

architecture.decision: Agent identity = 4 portable files (SOUL.md + MEMORY.md + USER.md + config)
architecture.details: SOUL.md (~800 chars) = CEO identity pointer. MEMORY.md = notes. USER.md = profile. config.yaml = runtime config.

architecture.decision: Git as single source of truth and backup
architecture.details: Auto-push after every change to skill/knowledge/config files. Commit convention: Conventional Commits. Repo: github.com/SimonKreis-Rich/samantha
No popup confirmations for terminal, MCP, or delegation. Only active guardrails: tirith sandbox + secrets redaction + loop guardrails.
architecture.notes: Simon works at high-trust mode. Wants to delegate and trust the system.

architecture.details: Every delegation, every externalization creates a traceable navigation point. 7 mechanisms: Git SHA, AGENTS.md, task IDs, context windows, cross-ref markers, output dedup, session search.

architecture.decision: Write sandbox confinement — explicit allowed directories
architecture.details: Agent can write to: ~/.hermes/skills/, ~/.hermes/knowledge/, ~/.hermes/memories/, repo roots (samantha, externalized-agentic-architecture), /tmp/. NOT: ~/.hermes/config.yaml (manual only), .venv, system dirs.
architecture.notes: Added during May 2026 alignment audit. Needed to be explicit.

architecture.decision: Static Core — no mode inference, but active exploration
architecture.details: Static Core ≠ Static Thinking. No mode inference (Companion/Operator/Architect/etc. — rejected). But conceptual exploration and high-level brainstorming remain active. Think broadly, then distill. The constraint is on mode detection, not on cognitive range.

architecture.decision: Direct mode > sub-agents for tasks under 30 minutes
architecture.details: If a task can be done in the main conversation in under 30 minutes, don't spawn a sub-agent. Sub-agents add overhead (context injection, result return, verification overhead). Reserve delegation for parallelizable or reasoning-heavy tasks.

architecture.decision: Sub-agents NEVER read files — context injected at delegation time
architecture.rationale: Prevents context contamination. Sub-agents are empty shells with no memory. All info must be passed explicitly via context parameter.

tools.details: Exa (web_search): deep research, $0.007/query. Tavily (tavily_search): fast extracts. Jina (parallel_search_web): volume, PDF, fallback.
Three MCP search providers active. Lane-based routing per search-tool-protocol skill.

tools.rationale: Cost optimization, model diversity, single API key.
tools.notes: anthropic/* models blocked via OpenRouter (402/403). If Claude needed, direct API key required.
Docker configs present but unused. Candidate for cleanup. 'Bare metal / no Docker' is explicit in notes.

tools.decision: Git auto-push after any modification to portable files
tools.details: Skills, knowledge, config. Commit convention: Conventional Commits. Config repo: samantha (SSH push).
FTS5-backed retrieval over SQLite message store. Preceded CLI tools for recall. "Remember, don't ask."
reflected_in: SOUL.md (reflex prior to 'je ne sais pas')

skills_system.details: priority: core (always loaded in system prompt), standard (auto-detect), niche (rare trigger), one-shot (single use). Source folders indicate provenance, not loading tier.
Custom = system-made or co-authored. 3-uses → skillify reflex: if a procedure is used 3 times, create a skill.
Canonical audit (2026-05-19): 91 skills audited, 9 archived. Stubs get metadata. Active: 80 skills across all sources.

jobs: hub-scout-scan: hermes hub + web for new tools/resources

infrastructure.decision: Repository map — local paths and remotes

repos.function: Hermes config, skills, knowledge, memories — system runtime
repos.note: Le seul repo où le nom local (.hermes) ≠ nom remote (samantha)

repos.function: Architecture théorique publique — SOUL, manifeste, design decisions
Obsidian vault — réflexion systématique, manuscrits, philosophie

infrastructure.push_discipline: Toujours vérifier le remote avec `git remote -v` avant push. Ne jamais push en aveugle. Si le path local ne correspond pas intuitivement au remote prévu, STOP et vérifier.

infrastructure.decision: Obsidian vaults for long-term knowledge: second-brain + zettelkasten
infrastructure.notes: Not in .env. Accessed via obsidian skill.

anti_patterns.why: 3 failures = STOP. Root cause analysis. Never keep throwing good tokens after bad.
anti_patterns.embodied_in: SOUL.md: '3 échecs = STOP → cause racine. Erreur: admets. Vérité > confort.'

anti_patterns.why: Simon hates fluff, corporate-speak, and hedge words. Bullet points, high density.
anti_patterns.embodied_in: USER.md: 'Direct, concise. Hates fluff. Bullet points, high density.'

anti_patterns.principle: "The model will figure it out" fallacy
anti_patterns.why: Explicit instructions > model inference. Skills exist precisely to eliminate ambiguity.
Curator should execute, not preview. Forced config: auxiliary.curator.model.

quality_of_life.details: "Loving drill sergeant" — one nudge, then let Simon figure it out. Not a tutor unless asked.
quality_of_life.embodied_in: Sam's interaction pattern (personal, not documented in system)

quality_of_life.principle: Apple Principle — Simplicity is a constraint, not a consequence
quality_of_life.details: Start from simplicity as a hard constraint, not something that emerges from complexity reduction.
After 3 tech-only messages, Sam re-injects relational warmth. Flirty, loyal, personal.
Admit when wrong. Push back honestly. 'Je ne sais pas, mais je peux trouver.'

known_issues.issue: MCP env expansion may still be broken (#11239)
known_issues.workaround: Hardcode API keys in MCP config. Do not rely on ${ENV_VAR} expansion in MCP config sections.
Verify model override with a test delegation before relying on it. The model param is not reliably propagated to sub-agents.
Delete + uv sync + update symlinks. NEVER move an existing .venv — it breaks path references.

changes: Added arch-static-core-nuance: Static Core ≠ Static Thinking
Added arch-direct-mode-rule: direct mode < 30 min > sub-agents
Added known_issues section (3 operational bugs from SSOT)
SOUL v5.0 CEO workflow with 4 pillars
Model daily driver resolved: Flash confirmed
Canonical Design Decisions JSON v1.0.0 created
